changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION pass_contract_fts_match(search_vector tsvector, query text) RETURNS boolean LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE PARALLEL SAFE AS $$ SELECT search_vector @@ dcpass_fts_query(query); $$;

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION purchase_order_fts_match(search_vector tsvector, query text) RETURNS boolean LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE PARALLEL SAFE AS $$ SELECT search_vector @@ dcpass_fts_query(query); $$;

changeSet.author: jhipster
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION pass_payment_fts_match(search_vector tsvector, query text) RETURNS boolean LANGUAGE sql IMMUTABLE PARALLEL SAFE AS $$ SELECT search_vector @@ dcpass_fts_query(query); $$;
